content: ICM curiosity mechanisms can be repurposed to actively prune low-value context from an LLM agent's working memory during multi-step reasoning, directly compensating for the working memory capacity limits that bound long-range reasoning performance. This creates a self-regulating loop where the agent's intrinsic motivation for novel, high-reward discovery also keeps its working memory within functional capacity.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
